tasks.task_description: Phase 1: Probe Q API directly via q_direct.py for each candidate model
Phase 2: Diff verified-OK list against bridge FALLBACK_MODELS, plugin config.yaml, hermes config.yaml
Phase 3: Apply adjustments if drift found
Phase 4: Verify bridge catalog and smoke test

description: Run no-q-CLI model calibration loop against q_direct.py: probe Q API directly, diff sources, adjust if needed, verify bridge
context: Phase 1 done. q_direct.chat() ignores model param (Q selects server-side). All 3 candidates OK: claude-haiku-4.5, claude-sonnet-4, claude-sonnet-4.5. conv_id=none (Q not returning conversationId for this account).
Phase 2 done. No drift found. FALLBACK_MODELS, plugin config.yaml default_model, hermes config.yaml model.default and providers.aws-build.models all match verified-OK set. No adjustments needed.
